login.title: Vetchium
login.emailMinLength: Email must be at least {{min}} characters
login.emailMaxLength: Email must be at most {{max}} characters
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
login.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most {{max}} characters
login.accountInvalidState: Account is not in a valid state to login

tfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
tfa.subtitle: A 6-digit code has been sent to your email
tfa.tokenMissing: TFA token missing. Please login again.
tfa.tokenExpired: TFA token expired or invalid. Please login again.
tfa.invalidCode: Invalid TFA code. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Please enter your new password below.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
resetPassword.passwordMismatch: The two passwords that you entered do not match!
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: The password reset link is invalid or missing.
resetPassword.linkExpired: The reset link has expired or is invalid.
resetPassword.success: Password has been reset successfully. Please login.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been updated successfully. Please login with your new email.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
changePassword.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match!
changePassword.incorrectPassword: Current password is incorrect or session expired.

changeEmail.title: Change Email
changeEmail.successMessage: We have sent a verification link to your new email address. Please click the link to confirm the change.
